definition:
1. to call back, recall , from exile, (Herdotus Historicus) 
2. to call away  or aside , (Xenophon Historicus) 
3. to call  by a name , especially by way of disparagement, to stigmatise as , τὸν τοῦ μανέντος ξύναιμον ἀποκαλοῦντες (Sophocles Tragicus); σοφιστὴν ἀπ. τινα (Xenophon Historicus) (ML)
